Cultura JГғВәnior JOYn Group A <strong>JOYn RH</strong> ГғВ© uma consultoria especializada em <strong>recrutamento</strong>, contratamos os melhores talentos para nossos clientes espalhados pelo Brasil e Mundo.<br><br><strong>Sobre a Vaga<br><br></strong>Estamos em busca de um(a) Assistente de RH para apoiar a operaГғВ§ГғВЈo da ГғВЎrea de Recursos Humanos, executando rotinas administrativas e processos operacionais sob supervisГғВЈo, garantindo a qualidade e a pontualidade das entregas que sustentam o ciclo de vida do funcionГғВЎrio.<br><br><strong>Responsabilidades<br><br></strong>ГўВ–ВӘ Atender o canal de comunicaГғВ§ГғВЈo da ГғВЎrea (e-mail), apoiando os colaboradores em dГғВәvidas e demandas operacionais;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Apoiar processos operacionais de admissГғВЈo, desligamento, promoГғВ§ГғВөes, fГғВ©rias e cadastros em sistemas,<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Apoiar o fechamento da Folha de Pagamento, organizando informaГғВ§ГғВөes como atestados, premiaГғВ§ГғВөes, benefГғВӯcios e demais variГғВЎveis;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Realizar o agendamento de exames periГғВіdicos e o controle dos respectivos comprovantes;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Manter a organizaГғВ§ГғВЈo das pastas e dos registros de colaboradores, garantindo informaГғВ§ГғВөes atualizadas e em conformidade com a LGPD;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Apoiar a comunicaГғВ§ГғВЈo interna operacional, divulgando informativos sobre banco de horas, reajustes, benefГғВӯcios e demais comunicados da ГғВЎrea;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Apoiar aГғВ§ГғВөes de endomarketing e eventos internos (CafГғВ© dos Aniversariantes, datas comemorativas, coffee breaks e materiais para encontros), articulando ГғВЎreas internas (RecepГғВ§ГғВЈo, Marketing, Controladoria) e fornecedores para viabilizГғВЎ-los;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Apoiar a infraestrutura e a organizaГғВ§ГғВЈo do espaГғВ§o, incluindo pedidos operacionais (mercado, cafГғВ©, frutas) e o acompanhamento de entregas e estoques;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Apoiar processos de Recrutamento e SeleГғВ§ГғВЈo quando demandado: divulgaГғВ§ГғВЈo de vagas, atualizaГғВ§ГғВЈo de artes, triagens iniciais e agendamento de entrevistas;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Submeter Гғ GestГғВЈo as etapas de processos que exijam validaГғВ§ГғВЈo, conforme fluxos definidos pela ГғВЎrea.<br><br><strong>Requisitos<br><br></strong><strong>O que precisamos:<br><br></strong>ГўВ–ВӘ FormaГғВ§ГғВЈo tГғВ©cnica, em curso ou superior em AdministraГғВ§ГғВЈo, GestГғВЈo de Recursos Humanos, Psicologia ou afins;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Conhecimentos bГғВЎsicos de rotinas administrativas de Recursos Humanos (admissГғВЈo, desligamento, fГғВ©rias, folha de pagamento);<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Conhecimento bГғВЎsico em legislaГғВ§ГғВЈo trabalhista (CLT) e procedimentos de Departamento Pessoal;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Conhecimento bГғВЎsico em LGPD aplicada ao tratamento de dados de colaboradores;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ DomГғВӯnio do Pacote Office, com ГғВӘnfase em Excel e Word;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Familiaridade com sistemas de RH e plataformas de comunicaГғВ§ГғВЈo (e-mail corporativo, LinkedIn);<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ NoГғВ§ГғВөes de organizaГғВ§ГғВЈo documental e arquivamento fГғВӯsico e digital<br><br><strong>Sobre o Comportamento Esperado<br><br></strong>ГўВ–ВӘ OrganizaГғВ§ГғВЈo e atenГғВ§ГғВЈo a detalhes na execuГғВ§ГғВЈo de rotinas administrativas;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ ComunicaГғВ§ГғВЈo clara e cordial, com boa redaГғВ§ГғВЈo para comunicados internos e para o contato com colaboradores e fornecedores;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ Capacidade de seguir fluxos e procedimentos definidos pela ГғВЎrea;<br><br>ГўВ–ВӘ GestГғВЈo do tempo para lidar com mГғВәltiplas demandas Nopia is built around harmonic interplay in a unique way. Rather than a few knobs and a keyboard controlling a single synth patch, it blends multiple modules - keys, bass, arp, and pad - into a single performance, not unlike a drumless groovebox . As CEO of Image Line, the company behind FL Studio, Constantin has overseen the introduction of a number of AI-powered features like stem separation and its Gopher chatbot. Before taking the reins of Image Line in 2022, Constantin was the head of Native Instruments, where he spearheaded the shift towards digital services, did a stint in marketing, вҖҰ Read the full story at The Verge. ]]> Cameron Faulkner https://www.theverge.com/?p=964138 2026-07-10T14:59:55-04:00 2026-07-11T11:00:00-04:00 If youвҖҷre the type of person who could always use a little extra positive affirmation, or you have a weakness for weird gadgets, the Talking Flower might be of interest. IвҖҷm only kind of serious. The toy is based on a character from Super Mario Bros. Wonder that guides Mario through levels with quippy, whimsical remarks. ItвҖҷs a little weird that it even exists, but, then again, this is the company that made Alarmo . The Talking Flower debuted for $34.99, but it got a small price reduction at Amazon and Walmart . ItвҖҷll instead cost you $29.99 to buy the cute talking toy. Nintendo Talking Flower Where to Buy: $34.99 $29.99 at Amazon $34.99 $29.99 at Walmart The Talking Flower doesnвҖҷt have much utility. Unlike the $110 Alarmo , it canвҖҷt serve as an alarm even though it asks when you go to bed and wake up (so that it knows when to keep quiet). ItвҖҷs there to call out every passing hour when youвҖҷre awake, and to say random stuff unprompted. It can make comments about the general time of day, as well as the temperature thanks to its built-in thermometer. The Talking Flower lacks a microphone, and it doesnвҖҷt connect to the internet. However, it has a button thatвҖҷll make it say things, if you donвҖҷt want to wait for it to randomly blurt out its pre-programmed thoughts. Like in the video game, you can select the language it speaks. My colleague Andrew Webster went hands-on with the Talking Flower, and his takeaway was that itвҖҷs a drip feed of whimsy. However, it would occasionally say something that reminded Andrew to take care of himself, whether it be to slow down and relax or to take a lunch break. IвҖҷm entertained by many reviews on Amazon, which highlight that buyers are split on being annoyed with the Talking Flower, but loving it anyway вҖ” just like the character in Wonder . ]]> Terrence OвҖҷBrien https://www.theverge.com/?p=964478 2026-07-11T10:18:33-04:00 2026-07-11T10:18:33-04:00 Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will head the UAP Science Advisory Council established by the White House, the Pentagon, the Office of the Director of National Intelligence, the FBI, and "the intelligence community." Javits Federal Building in December 2025. | Photo by Michael Nigro/Pacific Press/LightRocket via Getty Images Donald Trump's Homeland Security regime has been at the center of two critical stories in the past two weeks. Storylines that span dozens of hours, side quests so big they could be their own game, massive worlds that require complex maps to explore, and casts so big you start forgetting character names. That's part of what makes these games feel like epic adventures, but it can also make them intimidating, particularly if you have limited spare time. Dosa Divas , on the other hand, manages to capture much of that same feeling in a package that spans less than 10 hours. IвҖҷm only kind of serious. The toy is based on a character from Super Mario Bros. Wonder that guides Mario through levels with quippy, whimsical remarks. ItвҖҷs a little weird that it even exists, but, then again, this is the company that made Alarmo . The Talking Flower debuted for $34.99, but it got a small price reduction at Amazon and Walmart . ItвҖҷll instead cost you $29.99 to buy the cute talking toy. Nintendo Talking Flower Where to Buy: $34.99 $29.99 at Amazon $34.99 $29.99 at Walmart The Talking Flower doesnвҖҷt have much utility. Unlike the $110 Alarmo , it canвҖҷt serve as an alarm even though it asks when you go to bed and wake up (so that it knows when to keep quiet). ItвҖҷs there to call out every passing hour when youвҖҷre awake, and to say random stuff unprompted. It can make comments about the general time of day, as well as the temperature thanks to its built-in thermometer. The Talking Flower lacks a microphone, and it doesnвҖҷt connect to the internet. However, it has a button thatвҖҷll make it say things, if you donвҖҷt want to wait for it to randomly blurt out its pre-programmed thoughts. Like in the video game, you can select the language it speaks. My colleague Andrew Webster went hands-on with the Talking Flower, and his takeaway was that itвҖҷs a drip feed of whimsy. However, it would occasionally say something that reminded Andrew to take care of himself, whether it be to slow down and relax or to take a lunch break. The Xbox version that supports a host of other platforms including PlayStation, PC, and Switch is available in both black and white . The PlayStation version, which supports the same platforms except for Xbox, is discounted in white . Both versions can also connect to mobile devices via Bluetooth. SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless The Nova Pro Wireless gaming headset supports active noise cancellation, swappable batteries, Bluetooth support, and compatibility with PC and most consoles вҖ” including Xbox and PlayStation. This model includes a base station that makes it easy to toggle crucial sound settings. Read our review . Where to Buy: $379.99 $239.99 at SteelSeries (Xbox, black, blemished box) $379.99 $239.99 at SteelSeries (Playstation, white, blemished box) $379.99 $239.99 at SteelSeries (Xbox, white, blemished box) This isnвҖҷt your average price reduction; SteelSeriesвҖҷ reason for discounting the headsets is because their packaging is damaged. It assures that the hardware inside is still unused and undamaged, and the headset includes the same one-year warranty as any of its new headsets. The Nova Pro Wireless was an impressive gaming headset when it launched four years ago вҖ” and still is вҖ” especially at this price point. It has all the features youвҖҷre probably expecting from a high-end wireless headset, like active noise cancellation for blocking out sounds, a noise-canceling microphone for clear callouts and crisp voice delivery, and Bluetooth connectivity in case you need to take a call. In addition, the slick USB base station adds a ton of unique functionality, like charging a spare batteries to minimize downtime when one dies, onboard controls for game profiles and sound mixing, and the ability to blend up to three inputs at a time (including Bluetooth). There are some things you should keep in mind if youвҖҷre thinking of picking up the Arctis Nova Pro Wireless. Our reviewers disagreed on its comfort. Neither found it uncomfortable, but both agreed that itвҖҷs heavier than other SteelSeries headsets. If you were considering the newer and more expensive Nova Pro Omni , this headset has most of the same unique features at a much more palatable price point. Read our SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro review . ]]> David Pierce https://www.theverge.com/?p=964515 2026-07-12T10:38:01-04:00 2026-07-12T10:38:01-04:00 A photo of a lightbulb glowing purple. | Photo: Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge The state of the smart home can be frustrating, because it is just so obvious how things ought to work. The Xbox version that supports a host of other platforms including PlayStation, PC, and Switch is available in both black and white . The PlayStation version, which supports the same platforms except for Xbox, is discounted in white . Both versions can also connect to mobile devices via Bluetooth. SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless The Nova Pro Wireless gaming headset supports active noise cancellation, swappable batteries, Bluetooth support, and compatibility with PC and most consoles вҖ” including Xbox and PlayStation. This model includes a base station that makes it easy to toggle crucial sound settings. Read our review . Where to Buy: $379.99 $239.99 at SteelSeries (Xbox, black, blemished box) $379.99 $239.99 at SteelSeries (Playstation, white, blemished box) $379.99 $239.99 at SteelSeries (Xbox, white, blemished box) This isnвҖҷt your average price reduction; SteelSeriesвҖҷ reason for discounting the headsets is because their packaging is damaged. It assures that the hardware inside is still unused and undamaged, and the headset includes the same one-year warranty as any of its new headsets. The Nova Pro Wireless was an impressive gaming headset when it launched four years ago вҖ” and still is вҖ” especially at this price point. It has all the features youвҖҷre probably expecting from a high-end wireless headset, like active noise cancellation for blocking out sounds, a noise-canceling microphone for clear callouts and crisp voice delivery, and Bluetooth connectivity in case you need to take a call. In addition, the slick USB base station adds a ton of unique functionality, like charging a spare batteries to minimize downtime when one dies, onboard controls for game profiles and sound mixing, and the ability to blend up to three inputs at a time (including Bluetooth). There are some things you should keep in mind if youвҖҷre thinking of picking up the Arctis Nova Pro Wireless. Our reviewers disagreed on its comfort. Neither found it uncomfortable, but both agreed that itвҖҷs heavier than other SteelSeries headsets. If you were considering the newer and more expensive Nova Pro Omni , this headset has most of the same unique features at a much more palatable price point. Peacock was named specifically, appearing as a […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> AI has triggered the biggest gas-plant building boom in history, and a quiet fight to stop it https://thenextweb.com/news/ai-data-centres-gas-plants-clean-energy-fight Sun, 12 Jul 2026 15:21:32 +0000 TheNextWeb=e8c6f8b02183223ddcc4fead7aeff49c The AI build-out has done something the fossil-fuel industry could not do for itself. Nunc ut sem vitae risus tristique posuere. design, digital nomad Kanke, 2026-07-11T22:20:00+00:00 1134723 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-heading-ux-ui-design-k7-tech-1134723 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png CRM & Lifecycle Manager Joko <p style="min-height:1.5em">At Joko, we help consumers shop smarter<strong>. </strong>Our mission is to revolutionize shopping, empowering people to find what they need, make informed decisions, and save money.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Founded in Paris, Joko is a tech company and certified B Corp with over 105 talents across Paris, Barcelona, and New York (and beyond). More than 6 million users already save money every day at 10,000+ merchants with Joko.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">From cashback and automatic coupons to price alerts and carbon tracking, we keep expanding our products to make shopping smarter. WeГўВҖВҷre now building an AI-powered shopping assistant to help users find the best products by price, quality, and environmental impact.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Having reached profitability in our core market, weГўВҖВҷre now scaling globally, with a strong focus on the US.<br /><br /><strong>ItГўВҖВҷs still day 1, come build the future of shopping with us!</strong></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><em>This position is remote-friendly.</em></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h3><strong>Г°ВҹВ§Вҡ Our Marketing team</strong></h3><p style="min-height:1.5em">No one is more creative and data-driven than this team; they truly combine the best of both worlds. The Marketing teamГўВҖВҷs mission is to put our product into the hearts and hands of millions of users around the world.</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">The Growth Team builds and scales innovative growth engines to conquer markets, attract, and retain users.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">The Brand &amp; Communications Team shapes Joko's long-term vision and builds a lasting emotional connection with users.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">The Campaign &amp; Merchandising Team drives our B2C campaign calendar and elevates the shopping experience.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">The B2B Marketing Team positions Joko as the top partner in our space and builds a standout employer brand.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em">Led by Isa, our CMO, the team is constantly innovating to take the business to new heights.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h3><strong>Г°ВҹВҺВҜ What you will do</strong></h3><p style="min-height:1.5em">As <strong>CRM &amp; Lifecycle Manager</strong>, your mission is to design and run lifecycle programs that turn new signups into engaged, loyal, high-LTV Joko users. You will own the end-to-end CRM strategy across in-app, push, and email from the first onboarding message to the campaign that reactivates dormant users. You will join the Growth team, report to the VP Growth, and partner daily with Product, Data, and Brand teams.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Your main missions will be:</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Guide new users to their first Joko ГўВҖВңwowГўВҖВқ moment:</strong> The first days shape everything that follows. YouГўВҖВҷll design the onboarding journey: messaging, timing, and triggers so every new user feels understood and reaches activation quickly. At our scale, getting those first touches right compounds into millions of engaged users.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Turn engaged users into power users, and power users into advocates:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll build retention and referral programs that deepen usage among our best users, drive word of mouth, and lift long-term retention.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Maximize LTV across the full lifecycle:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll design cross-channel journeys that deliver the right benefit to the right user at the right moment. YouГўВҖВҷll partner closely with Data to turn behavioral signals into segmentation and triggers, and with Product to keep lifecycle nudges tightly aligned with the in-app experience.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Raise the bar on experimentation:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll run a continuous A/B testing program (hypotheses, tests, learnings, iterations) to improve existing flows and challenge our current lifecycle map. Every decision should be grounded in evidence, not intuition.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Take CRM to the next level with AI:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll use AI to automate the operational grind (segmentation, copy iteration, QA, reporting) and unlock what we couldnГўВҖВҷt run manually: sharper personalization, faster experimentation cycles, and richer lifecycle logic. YouГўВҖВҷll decide where AI genuinely moves the needle (and where it doesnГўВҖВҷt), then ship production solutions.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Drive growth across the company:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll work hand-in-hand with Product, Data, User Acquisition, and Brand so CRM compounds alongside everything else weГўВҖВҷre building.</p></li></ul><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h3><strong>Г°ВҹВ‘ВҖ Who we're looking for</strong></h3><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Experience:</strong> You have 5+ years of experience in B2C CRM or lifecycle marketing, ideally in a high-growth mobile or consumer app. YouГўВҖВҷve owned lifecycle programs end-to-end, not just executed individual components.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>CRM craft:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷre hands-on with modern CRM platforms (Braze, Iterable, <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="http://Customer.io">Customer.io</a>, or similar) and you know what ГўВҖВңgoodГўВҖВқ looks like across in-app, push, and email. Deliverability, segmentation logic, template design, and orchestration are second nature.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Data-driven to the core:</strong> You read cohort curves, funnel data, and A/B test results fluently. You use data to form opinions and drive decisions, not just to build reports.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Experimentation mindset:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷve run structured A/B testing programs and know how to design experiments that actually teach you something, not just optimize a subject line.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Curious and hands-on with AI:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷre genuinely excited by what AI can do for CR

You will own the end-to-end CRM strategy across in-app, push, and email from the first onboarding message to the campaign that reactivates dormant users. You will join the Growth team, report to the VP Growth, and partner daily with Product, Data, and Brand teams.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Your main missions will be:</p><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Guide new users to their first Joko ГўВҖВңwowГўВҖВқ moment:</strong> The first days shape everything that follows. YouГўВҖВҷll design the onboarding journey: messaging, timing, and triggers so every new user feels understood and reaches activation quickly. At our scale, getting those first touches right compounds into millions of engaged users.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Turn engaged users into power users, and power users into advocates:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll build retention and referral programs that deepen usage among our best users, drive word of mouth, and lift long-term retention.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Maximize LTV across the full lifecycle:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll design cross-channel journeys that deliver the right benefit to the right user at the right moment. YouГўВҖВҷll partner closely with Data to turn behavioral signals into segmentation and triggers, and with Product to keep lifecycle nudges tightly aligned with the in-app experience.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Raise the bar on experimentation:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll run a continuous A/B testing program (hypotheses, tests, learnings, iterations) to improve existing flows and challenge our current lifecycle map. Every decision should be grounded in evidence, not intuition.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Take CRM to the next level with AI:</strong> YouГўВҖВҷll use AI to automate the operational grind (segmentation, copy iteration, QA, reporting) and unlock what we couldnГўВҖВҷt run manually: sharper personalization, faster experimentation cycles, and richer lifecycle logic. Deliverability, segmentation logic, template design, and orchestration are second nature.</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em"><strong>Data-driven to the core:</strong> You read cohort curves, funnel data, and A/B test results fluently. oldContent: The Verge The Verge is about technology and how it makes us feel. Founded in 2011, we offer our audience everything from breaking news to reviews to award-winning features and investigations, on our site, in video, and in podcasts. 2026-07-12T16:27:06+00:00 https://www.theverge.com/rss/index.xml https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/01/verge-rss-large_80b47e.png?w=150&h=150&crop=1 Terrence OвҖҷBrien https://www.theverge.com/?p=964519 2026-07-12T12:27:06-04:00 2026-07-12T12:27:06-04:00 Apple's self-driving car program never really got off the ground , but it may have been what made the company's chips the powerful AI performers they are. Early in the development of the self-driving platform, Apple realized that it would need powerful on-device AI processing . While the car processor was never finished , as Mark Gurman details in his latest Power On newsletter, it did lead to the development of the Neural Engine, the backbone of Apple's on-device AI processing. The Neural Engine made its debut with the iPhone X and the A11 Bionic . newContent: Remote OK Video Editor Off Season Atlanta Gladiators The Atlanta Gladiators are seeking a creative and detail-oriented <strong>Off-Season Video Editor Intern</strong> to help bring previous seasons back to life through engaging video content. This internship is ideal for someone looking to build a sports editing portfolio and gain hands-on experience creating content for a professional sports organization.<br><br>Using footage captured throughout previous seasons, this intern will edit and repurpose content into videos for social media, the team website, game presentation, marketing campaigns, and other digital platforms. They will also assist with larger creative projects as needed, helping tell the story of the Gladiators during the offseason.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br></strong><ul><li> Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Facebook, and X. </li><li> Repurpose existing game footage into engaging offseason content. </li><li> Create videos for the Atlanta Gladiators website, email marketing, game operations, and promotional campaigns. </li><li> Assist with larger video projects, including season recaps, hype videos, ticket campaigns, and special initiatives. </li><li> Organize and manage video assets. </li><li> Stay up to date on social media trends and identify opportunities to adapt them using existing footage. </li><li> Collaborate with departments on creative concepts and content planning. </li><li> Meet project deadlines while maintaining the Atlanta Gladiators' brand standards. <br><br></li></ul><strong>Qualifications:<br><br></strong><ul><li> Experience editing videos using Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or similar software. </li><li> Strong understanding of short-form social media content and current digital trends. </li><li> Ability to tell compelling stories through editing, pacing, music, and graphics. </li><li> Creative mindset with strong attention to detail. </li><li> Ability to work independently and communicate effectively in a remote environment. </li><li> Interest in sports, hockey, or live event entertainment is preferred but not required. <br><br></li></ul>We are an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, age, disability, gender identity,
